name: Pixel Fishing
author: Poki
description: Pixel Fishing is a retro-style fishing game where you can showcase your incredible fishing skills in a cute pixelated world! Cast your hook into the water and reel in the biggest fish you can find. As you progress, upgrade your fishing rod, line length, and bait to unlock rare and exotic fish species. Travel to new and beautiful pixelated locations and complete daily quests to earn special rewards. Are you ready to embark on this pixel-perfect fishing adventure? How to play Pixel Fishing? Move your rod left and right with your mouse or your finger. Who created Pixel Fishing? Pixel Fishing is created by Kzunec Games. Play their other games on Poki: Draw Pixel Art ! How can I play Pixel Fishing for free? You can play Pixel Fishing for free on Poki. Can I play Pixel Fishing on mobile devices and desktop? Pixel Fishing can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
